**LoLuminous** by **LoL Inc** is the upgrade for your Minecraft client! Made for beautiful looks, smooth animations and with good performance. Whether you're exploring vast landscapes, building masterpieces, or battling on Hypixel and other servers, LoLuminous ensures every moment looks breathtaking.

> **ΏθΦξ Features:**
> 
> έεΖ Beautiful Shaders
> 
> έεΖ Smooth Animations
> 
> έεΖServer-Compatible
> 
> έεΖ Optimized for Performance

<details>
<summary>FAQ</summary>

**General Questions**

Q: What is LoLuminous?: LoLuminous by LoL Inc is a Minecraft modpack designed to enhance your gameέΑβs visuals. It includes beautiful shaders and optimizations while remaining compatible with multiplayer servers like Hypixel.

Q: Which Minecraft versions does LoLuminous support?A: LoLuminous is compatible with 1.21.1 for now.

Q: Does LoLuminous work on multiplayer servers?A: Yes! LoLuminous is designed to be fully server-compatible, including Hypixel and other major multiplayer servers.

**Compatibility**

Q: Will LoLuminous reduce my FPS?: Yes! This modpack uses shaders and many things so it can lag, Download [Lol Optimization](https://modrinth.com/modpack/lol-optimization) if you have a patato ΏθβΓ

Q: Is LoLuminous available for Bedrock Edition?A: No, LoLuminous is only available for Minecraft Java Edition. Modpacks can't be run on bedrock.

**Troubleshooting
**
Q: My game is crashing or lagging after installing LoLuminous. What should I do?A: Try these steps:

Ensure your game is running a supported Minecraft version.

Allocate more RAM in your launcher (at least 4GB recommended).

Remove conflicting mods and try running LoLuminous alone.

Update your graphics drivers.

Q: My shaders arenέΑβt working properly. How do I fix them?

Check the following:

Make sure your graphics settings are set to Fancy or higher.

Ensure your PC meets the recommended specifications.

Try different shader presets within LoLuminous settings.

Q: Where can I report bugs or suggest features?A: You can report bugs and provide feedback on our [Discord](https://discord.gg/Jwaq4aea9b). We appreciate your support in making LoLuminous even better!


</details>
